description: KM71 Ladder missing a rung in the middle.
Km73 ladder with four rungs missing has been repaired by guardians. Only missing the very bottom rung which was 6” off the ground so not a problem anymore.
2 bears hanging out at Darling this afternoon and into the evening. Focused on high tide line above the mouth of the river (north side).
The 13 rung ladder segment at the KM73 gully is missing the bottommost rung, making it a big step up/down from the platform.
Forest route between Tsocowis and Darling has not been brushed yet this season.  Trail is visible but crowded by foliage.
Multiple missing ladder rungs in this section, 4 on one ladder making it very difficult to pass. Use caution especially going down!!
Was able to cross Klanawa river without the cable car at the mouth of the river at low tide.
Small black bear foraging in the intertidal zone between Darling and Michigan. We gave him lots of space and he watched us pass by before resuming foraging on the beach.
The trail was mostly dry, offering summer-like conditions. However, there were some mud bogs between the 65 km and 64 km marks.
